api_key_2.description: JustCall API key pair (api_key:api_secret). Sent verbatim as the Authorization header (no Bearer prefix); never logged.

base_url.description: JustCall API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only calls/sms at or after this time are read on a fresh sync.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
